_comment: POST /api/v1/clusters — provision musings single-node dev/test cluster (T-026)
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Host: gitopsgui.podzone.cloud' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: cluster-operators' -d @clusters/musings-create.json http://freyr:8081/api/v1/clusters
_schema_gaps: Task file (2026-03-28-dev-functional-testing.md) omits vip, ip_range, sops_secret_ref — all required by ClusterSpec.
Task file has allow_scheduling_on_controlplanes (no underscores) — field is allow_scheduling_on_control_planes.
Task file has storage.enabled/storage.size — legacy names, migrated by StorageSpec._migrate_legacy_fields.
Task file has worker_count=1 but task description says 'single node'; single-node requires worker_count=0 + allow_scheduling_on_control_planes=true.
name: musings
